## Checks
- [ ] `hugo server` runs cleanly and the change looks right in **ES** and **EN**
- [ ] No secrets / private URLs committed (repo is public)
- [ ] Images are WebP + compressed (see [image guidelines](../README.md#image-guidelines))
- [ ] UI strings updated in both `i18n/es.yaml` and `i18n/en.yaml` (if text changed)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`)
